model_specification_line: result = smf.wls('full_time ~ daca_eligible + UNEMP + C(year) + C(statefip)', data=df, weights=df['perwt'], missing='drop').fit(cov_type='HC1')
sample_selection: age between 18 and 34 inclusive with positive person weights (perwt > 0)
non-missing birth year and year of immigration so DACA eligibility can be defined
